creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #20)
> BTW, this also saves databases/jasperreports from deprecation.

Only if jasperreports has no separate issues, which I'm not positive is the case.  Somebody should take the initiative to built jasperreports in poudriere and see if that's successful.

Also, it would be interesting to know if jasperreports is at the latest version or conversely is several versions behind.  If the latter, and nobody has bothered to maintain it, it might still be worth removing.

In other words, I didn't remove the expiration flag from jasperreports simply because apache-poi is fixed.  It needs a separate review IMO.
